source.title: Result Note: CTA abdomen — incidental pancreatic cyst, please forward to PCP
source.body: CTA abdomen reviewed. Cardiac findings unremarkable. Incidental 1.4 cm simple-appearing pancreatic cyst noted; below standard threshold for cardiology workup. Please forward results to her PCP (Felicity Ashbrook MD) for further follow-up.

nurseNote:
Dr. Loxley reviewed CTA abdomen today. Cardiac findings unremarkable. Incidental 1.4 cm simple-appearing pancreatic cyst noted; below threshold for cardiology workup. Forwarded to PCP (Felicity Ashbrook MD) for further follow-up per provider request.

Patient notified via MyChart.

mychart.subject: Test results
mychart.body:
Dr. Loxley has reviewed your recent CT scan. From a heart standpoint everything looks unremarkable.

The scan also showed a small 1.4 cm cyst on your pancreas (an incidental finding), which is not something we follow from cardiology. We have forwarded the results to your primary care provider (Dr. Felicity Ashbrook) so her office can decide on any additional follow-up. If you have not heard from them within the next week or two, feel free to reach out to her office directly.

Brandon Sterne, RN BSN / Heart and Vascular Clinic

orders.type: Route imaging study to PCP (Felicity Ashbrook MD)
